query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of a gray perforated metal panel featuring a regular grid of square holes. Small fragments of colorful background scenery are visible through some openings, and faint printed text or markings appear along the lower edge of the sheet.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up view of a gray perforated metal panel featuring a regular grid of square holes, with small fragments of colorful background scenery visible through the openings and printed markings along the lower edge. The image lacks fine detail and crisp texture, rendering the metal surfaces and background elements in a soft, smeared manner where small structures dissolve into ambiguity rather than resolving into clear form.
